headline: Here’s Why Delta Air Lines (DAL) is Among the 10 Most Undervalued American Stocks to Invest In
summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued American Stocks to Invest In. On June 30, 2026, Wells Fargo raised its price target on Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) to $105 from $75 and kept an Overweight rating. Wells Fargo raised its estimates and price targets as fuel falls and demand […]

headline: Higher Airfares Are Sticking After Spring Price Hikes, Analyst Says
summary: BofA turns bullish on U.S. airlines ahead of Q2 earnings, raising price targets on strong demand and stable summer fares. Read more.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on United Airlines Holdings, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Andrew Didora   maintains United Airlines Holdings (NASDAQ:UAL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $145 to $150.

headline: United Airlines (UAL) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift As Analysts Raise Targets
summary: United Airlines Holdings is back in focus as fair value estimates are revised from US$132.08 to US$136.63, adjusting the central price target anchor analysts are using. The shift sits within a wider range of updated price targets, where recent research highlights how earnings execution, demand, fuel costs and valuation assumptions are shaping views on where the stock could trade. As you read on, you will see how these moving targets fit into the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch as...

headline: FAA Moves to Bring Civilian Supersonic Flights Back Over US, Sean Duffy Hails Move as Step Toward 'Golden Age of Travel'
summary: FAA proposes noise-based certification standard for supersonic flights over land, opening path for commercial use and American innovation.
